title: Transformation Decision Record — frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of a Transformation Decision Record (TDR), per spec.md §4.1. It validates the machine-readable fields only; the markdown body is human judgement and is deliberately not schema-constrained. See TDR-0006.

id.description: TDR-nnnn, unique within the owning organisation or repository.

title.description: Imperative or declarative statement of the decision.

decision_date.description: ISO 8601 date, YYYY-MM-DD. Frontmatter is validated as JSON: a YAML parser may load an unquoted date as a native date type, so normalise it to an ISO-8601 string before validation.

accountable_owner.description: A named individual — not a committee.

confidence.description: The owner's stated confidence at decision time. Required for full and minimal templates.

confirmed_by_outcome.description: `pending — <review trigger>`, a date plus evidence reference, or `none`. Required for full and minimal templates.

tdrRefList.description: One or more TDR ids (comma-separated), or the literal `none`.
